name: Tessian
description: AI-powered email security platform (now Proofpoint) providing adaptive protection against phishing, BEC, account takeover, and data loss via API-based deployment

actions.name: Get Security Events
actions.description: Retrieve security events detected by Tessian including phishing and data loss prevention

parameters.name: created_after
parameters.description: Filter events created after this ISO 8601 timestamp

parameters.name: created_before
parameters.description: Filter events created before this ISO 8601 timestamp

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: Get Event Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific security event

actions.name: Release from Quarantine
actions.description: Release an email from quarantine using the event ID

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event ID of the quarantined email

actions.name: Delete from Quarantine
actions.description: Permanently delete an email from quarantine

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event ID of the quarantined email

actions.name: Delete from Inbox
actions.description: Remediate an email by deleting it from the user's inbox

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event ID of the email to remediate

actions.name: Update Event Label
actions.description: Update the admin label on a security event

parameters.name: admin_label
parameters.description: Admin label to apply (confirmed_threat, false_positive, pending)
